sentences.target: Mon but est de finir ce rapport.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ byt ɛ də finiʁ sə ʁapɔʁ/

translations.fr: Mon but est de finir ce rapport.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ byt ɛ də finiʁ sə ʁapɔʁ/
translations.en: My goal is to finish this report.
translations.es: Mi objetivo es terminar este informe.
translations.de: Mein Ziel ist, diesen Bericht fertigzustellen.
translations.it: Il mio obiettivo è finire questa relazione.
translations.ko: 제 목표는 이 보고서를 마치는 것입니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的目标是完成这份报告。
translations.yue: 我嘅目標係完成呢份報告。
translations.pt: Meu objetivo é terminar este relatório.
translations.he: המטרה שלי היא לסיים את הדוח הזה.
translations.vi: Mục tiêu của tôi là hoàn thành báo cáo này.
translations.nl: Mijn doel is dit rapport af te ronden.
translations.hu: Célom, hogy befejezzem ezt a jelentést.
translations.hi: मेरा लक्ष्य इस रिपोर्ट को पूरा करना है.
translations.pl: Moim celem jest ukończenie tego raportu.
translations.el: Στόχος μου είναι να ολοκληρώσω αυτήν την αναφορά.
translations.nb: Målet mitt er å fullføre denne rapporten.
translations.id: Tujuan saya adalah menyelesaikan laporan ini.
translations.sv: Mitt mål är att slutföra den här rapporten.
translations.ro: Scopul meu este să termin acest raport.
translations.cs: Mým cílem je dokončit tuto zprávu.
translations.da: Mit mål er at færdiggøre denne rapport.
translations.fi: Tavoitteeni on saada tämä raportti valmiiksi.
translations.ja: 私の目標はこの報告書を終えることです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'but' to indicate possession by the speaker.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject ('but') to the infinitival predicate.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('de + infinitif').
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'de'; expresses the content of the goal.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'rapport'.
Common noun; direct object of 'finir'.

sentences.target: Son but est de marquer un point.
sentences.reading: /sɔ̃ byt ɛ də maʁke œ̃ pwɛ̃/

translations.fr: Son but est de marquer un point.
translations.ipa: /sɔ̃ byt ɛ də maʁke œ̃ pwɛ̃/
translations.en: Their goal is to score a point.
translations.es: Su objetivo es anotar un punto.
translations.de: Ihr Ziel ist, einen Punkt zu erzielen.
translations.it: Il loro obiettivo è segnare un punto.
translations.pt: O objetivo deles é marcar um ponto.
translations.vi: Mục tiêu của họ là ghi một điểm.
translations.nl: Hun doel is een punt te scoren.
translations.hi: उनका लक्ष्य एक अंक हासिल करना है.
translations.el: Στόχος τους είναι να σκοράρουν έναν πόντο.
translations.nb: Målet deres er å score ett poeng.
translations.id: Tujuan mereka adalah mencetak satu poin.
translations.sv: Deras mål är att göra ett poäng.
translations.ro: Scopul lor este să marcheze un punct.
translations.da: Deres mål er at score et point.
translations.ja: 彼らの目標は一点を取ることです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'but'.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the infinitival complement.
Preposition introducing the infinitive ('de + infinitif').
Infinitive verb complement of 'de'; here expresses the action targeted by the goal.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determining 'point'.
Common noun; direct object of 'marquer'.

sentences.target: Notre but est d'apprendre le français.

translations.fr: Notre but est d'apprendre le français.
translations.en: Our goal is to learn French.
translations.de: Unser Ziel ist, Französisch zu lernen.
translations.it: Il nostro obiettivo è imparare il francese.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的目标是学习法语。
translations.vi: Mục tiêu của chúng tôi là học tiếng Pháp.
translations.nl: Ons doel is Frans te leren.
translations.pl: Naszym celem jest nauczenie się francuskiego.
translations.el: Στόχος μας είναι να μάθουμε γαλλικά.
translations.nb: Målet vårt er å lære fransk.
translations.id: Tujuan kami adalah belajar bahasa Prancis.
translations.sv: Vårt mål är att lära oss franska.
translations.ro: Scopul nostru este să învățăm franceza.
translations.cs: Naším cílem je naučit se francouzsky.
translations.da: Vores mål er at lære fransk.
translations.ja: 私たちの目標はフランス語を学ぶことです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'but'.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the infinitival predicate.
Infinitive 'apprendre' with elided preposition 'de' (d'); functions as the complement in the 'de + infinitif' construction expressing the goal.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'français'.
Common noun denoting the French language; direct object of 'apprendre'.

sentences.target: Il défend le but de son équipe.
sentences.reading: /il defɑ̃ lə byt də sɔ̃ ekip/

translations.fr: Il défend le but de son équipe.
translations.ipa: /il defɑ̃ lə byt də sɔ̃ ekip/
translations.es: Él defiende la portería de su equipo.
translations.de: Er verteidigt das Tor seiner Mannschaft.
translations.it: Difende la porta della sua squadra.
translations.yue: 佢守住自己球隊嘅龍門。
translations.pt: Ele defende o gol de sua equipe.
translations.he: הוא מגן על שער הקבוצה שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy bảo vệ khung thành của đội mình.
translations.nl: Hij verdedigt het doel van zijn team.
translations.hi: वह अपनी टीम के गोल की रक्षा करता है।
translations.el: Υπερασπίζεται την εστία της ομάδας του.
translations.ja: 彼はチームのゴールを守っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular masculine); subject of the sentence.
Main verb (present tense); predicate of the clause.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'but'.
